3062190.name: First Dwarf Soundtrack
3062190.description:
First Dwarf - Original Game Soundtrack.
This music was created to take you on a journey. A journey in which you constantly discover new emotions and colors. It is a combination of classical orchestration with synthesizers and wonderful vocals, while the motifs and melody lead you to undiscovered musical regions.


Bartłomiej Lewczuk
A graduate of the arrangement and instrumentation class and jazz piano.
Composer and pianist,
Author of music for films, currently working on live music shows for classic films.
In his work he combines classical symphonic orchestration with electronics.
He is constantly looking for new sounds and old instruments. Keyboardist and producer on the independent music market.
